name: Suerte
reason: Acclaimed East Austin restaurant with communal tables perfect for team dining and shared plates.

name: Jo's Coffee
reason: Iconic Austin cafe with great outdoor seating and a relaxed vibe for morning team meetups.

name: Loro
reason: James Beard-nominated fusion spot with a large outdoor patio ideal for group dining.

name: Uchi
reason: World-class Japanese restaurant where omakase-style sharing creates a memorable team experience.

name: Terry Black's Barbecue
reason: Legendary Austin BBQ with long communal tables that naturally bring teams together over brisket.

name: Odd Duck
reason: Seasonal, locally sourced menu designed for sharing, making it ideal for team dinners.

name: Veracruz All Natural
reason: Beloved taco truck turned institution with fast, casual service perfect for team lunches.

name: Emmer & Rye
reason: Innovative grain-focused restaurant with a dim sum cart service that sparks conversation.

name: Ramen Tatsu-Ya
reason: Top-rated ramen spot with a lively atmosphere that energizes teams after a long work day.

name: Launderette
reason: Stylish East Austin spot with a versatile menu that accommodates diverse dietary needs.

name: Dai Due
reason: Butcher shop and restaurant celebrating Texas ingredients with a rustic team dinner atmosphere.

name: Salty Sow
reason: Neighborhood gastropub with a huge shaded patio and shareable meat and cheese boards.

name: Lenoir
reason: Intimate wine garden setting that creates a special occasion feel for milestone celebrations.

name: Nixta Taqueria
reason: James Beard Award-winning taqueria with casual counter service great for quick team lunches.

name: Intero
reason: Handmade pasta and wood-fired dishes with a family-style format that encourages sharing.
